case_title: LONG VINH NGO VS. NAIME MOHAMMED ABBUSHI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LONG VINH NGO AND DEFENDANT NAIME MOHAMMED ABBUSHI. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DARIN NGO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT NAIME MOHAMMED ABBUSHI. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DARIN NGO. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT DARIN NGO. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGO, LONG VINH AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, DARIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,420.00 FILED BY NGO, LONG VINH AS TO DEFENDANT ABBUSHI, NAIME MOHAMMED NGO, DARIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGO, LONG VINH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ABBUSHI, NAIME MOHAMMED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT DARIN NGO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT IS NOT EXPLAINED BY THIS LOW IMPACT, MINOR REAR-END CONTACT BETWEEN DEFENDANT'S AND PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED AUG-10-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABBUSHI, NAIME MOHAMMED
